content.en:
Ye Tian had the memories of Jin Zu, so he learned that a variety of Source Sea beings were 100% compatible with a certain Eternal Source Thing.

According to the screening, Ye Tian selected a weaker source sea life, the Silver Horn Source Clan, which was not a very powerful race in the Source Sea, but it also had close to ten supreme beings.

The compatibility between the Silver Horn Source Clan and the Eternal Source Silver and Copper Beads has reached 100%, but the Silver Horn Source Clan is a physical fit with the Silver Copper Beads, but the soul is not compatible.

What's more, the soul talent of the Silver Horn Source Clan is too poor, which causes many Silver Horn Source Clan people to be unable to cultivate to the realm of second-class invincibles in their lifetimes, and the limit is third-class invincibles.

But if you can't become a first-class invincible, even if you have a 100% fit with the silver and copper beads, it will be useless, and it is impossible for the Silver Horn Source Clan to let those clansmen who have no potential absorb and refine the origin of the silver and copper beads.

Therefore, there are not many supreme beings of the Silver Horn Source Clan.

Perhaps this is also the restriction of the supreme rule of the source sea.

The reason why Ye Tian was eyeing the Silver Horn Source Clan was not only because the Silver Horn Source Clan was weaker, but also because it would be easier to obtain the origin of the Silver Horn Source Clan.

According to his understanding and investigation, there was no first-class invincible person in this era of the Silver Horn Source Clan, so there was no need to consume the origin of silver and copper beads for the time being, and he had every opportunity to trade a part of the origin of silver and copper beads.

As for snatching the silver and bronze beads, he didn't have the idea, because it couldn't be realized.

The Supreme One of the Silver Horn Source Ancestor guards the silver and copper beads all the time, even if he copies the body of the Silver Horn Source Clan, there is no way to snatch the silver and copper beads.

So, he can only trade.

The Silver Horn Source Clan values soul treasures the most, and if they can trade treasures that change their soul qualifications, they are afraid that they will be willing to trade the origin of silver and copper beads.

And Ye Tian happened to have a treasure in his hand that could change his soul qualifications-the Eternal Soul Bead!

The source of the Eternal Soul Bead and the Eternal Soul Wood, the Eternal Soul Wood is the top dozens of Eternal Source Objects, naturally it is impossible to only have the effect of preserving consciousness, and the most powerful effect of the Eternal Soul Wood is that it can condense the Eternal Soul Wood.

And Jin Zu obtained the Eternal Soul Wood for a long time, and obtained a total of ten Eternal Soul Beads, but he had consumed or traded a few Eternal Soul Beads, resulting in only three Eternal Soul Beads left in his Void Ball.

"I used the authority of the Void Divine Son to investigate the identities of those Void Sons, and one of the Void Sons of the Third-Order Invincible Realm is from the Silver Horn Source Clan, so I'll contact him!" Ye Tian decided.

......

"The Void Son contacted me?"

Silver Ren from the Silver Horn Source Clan received a message from the Void Child Badge, and the other party didn't mention much, but he did mention the soul treasure.

I have to say that the soul treasure is indeed the treasure that the Silver Horn Source Clan needs the most.

In addition, the other party is a Void God Son, and his status is noble, so he naturally has to see it.

So, Yin Ren came to the Void Source Hall and met Ye Tian.

This time, Ye Tian still hid his identity, but Yin Ren didn't care.

"What are you looking for me?"

Yinren asked.

"Deal!" Ye Tian said, "I wonder if the Son of the Silver Void is interested in the Eternal Soul Bead?"

"What, Eternal Soul Orb!!!"

Yin Ren's expression changed drastically, and he was suddenly excited.

It was an incomparably rare soul treasure, an eternal soul bead condensed from the Eternal Soul Wood, a priceless treasure, even if the Silver Horn Origin Ancestor went to buy it, it would not be able to buy it at all.

Because the strong people with the Eternal Soul Wood don't look down on ordinary treasures, they will trade the Eternal Soul Bead unless they make them excited.

And the Silver Horn Source Clan is not too powerful in the entire Source Sea, plus it is unlucky, so it has never acquired the Eternal Soul Bead, and I don't even know who has the Eternal Soul Wood on it?

"Interested!"

Yin Ren said immediately.

Before Ye Tian could continue to speak, Yin Ren said, "If Your Excellency is willing to trade for me an Eternal Soul Bead, I am willing to pay any price. "

The Eternal Soul Orb may not be of great value to other Void Sons, and it can only increase the strength of the soul, but it is enough for him to change the future.

It has been a long time since he became a third-class invincible, but due to the problem of soul qualifications, his soul cultivation has not made much progress, and he has not been able to reach the level of the Nine Tribulations of the Soul Realm, how can he step into the realm of a second-class invincible?

But if he has the Eternal Soul Bead and improves his soul qualifications, he will be sure to become a second-class invincible, or even a first-class invincible.

As a member of the Silver Horn Source Clan, if he becomes a first-class invincible, he will be able to become a supreme person almost 100%, and he doesn't even need any supreme skills and eternal calamity, he can break through by directly absorbing the origin of silver and copper beads.

This is the advantage of the Silver Horn Origin Clan.

"You listen to me first!" Ye Tian said, "I only need one thing to trade the Eternal Soul Bead to you." "

"What's that?"

Yinren asked.

Ye Tian said very seriously: "The origin of the silver and copper beads, I don't need too many origins, just complete one-twentieth of the origin of the silver and copper beads." "

An eternal source object, as long as it does not extract one-third of the origin, can be slowly recovered, and one-twentieth of the origin is indeed not much.

"What, you want the origin of our Silver Horn Source Clan's Eternal Source Artifact Silver Copper Bead?"

Silver Ren frowned.

If someone else said this, it would be an enemy of the Silver Horn Source Clan, and they would turn their faces on the spot.

However, this time, Ye Tian had the Eternal Soul Bead, which was the treasure he desperately desired.

"I can't be the master of this matter for the time being!" Yin Ren confessed.

"I understand!" Ye Tian said with a smile: "So, I need you to go back and fight for it, I'll wait for your reply." I believe that if you can't win it, maybe someone from your Silver Horn Source Clan will be able to win it, and then the person who will trade with me won't necessarily be you. "

Yin Ren's expression changed, and he felt nervous.

Indeed, he was not the only one in the Silver Horn Source Clan who needed the Eternal Soul Orb, even if the other invincibles were not as talented as him.

However, he has not broken through so far, and he has disappointed many clansmen.

Therefore, he has a great sense of urgency.

If Ye Tian traded with other Silver Horn Source Clans, he didn't dare to imagine what his future would become.

Perhaps, this is the only chance he has to take it.

"I must make sure you have the Eternal Soul Orb in your hands!" said Yinren.

Ye Tian took out an Eternal Soul Bead and let Yin Ren take a look.

Yin Ren recognized it at a glance, this was indeed the real Eternal Soul Bead.

Immediately, he promised: "Your Excellency must not trade with anyone else, and I will give you an answer as soon as possible." "

After saying that, Yin Ren left through the Void Source Hall and returned to his clan land.
